Home › Court Services › Foreclosure Sales › Surplus Funds

Surplus Funds Available for Claim

Notice: Surplus funds arise when a foreclosed property sells for more than the total amount owed. Former owners and junior lienholders may be entitled to claim these funds. Claims must be filed within one (1) year of the foreclosure sale date. Contact the Civil Division at (305) 275-1155 with questions.

The table below lists surplus funds currently held by the Clerk of Courts pending timely claim. Records are updated as new sales are confirmed and amounts are verified. To initiate a claim, complete Form MC-3.900 and file with the Civil Division at 73 W. Flagler Street, Suite 238, Miami, FL 33130.

Case Number Owner Name Property Address Sale Date Surplus Amount

2024-CA-003417-0001-01 Robert Johnson 891 NW 36th Ave, Hialeah, FL 33012 01/22/2024 $12,750.00

2024-CA-009832-0001-01 David Williams 320 Coral Way, Coral Gables, FL 33134 03/18/2024 $67,800.00
2024-CA-016745-0001-01 Linda Chen 7890 NW 25th St, Doral, FL 33122 05/30/2024 $23,400.00
2023-CA-018562-0001-01 Michael Brown 445 NE 2nd Ave, Miami, FL 33132 06/11/2023 $8,950.00
2023-CA-027318-0001-01 Sandra Perez 2210 SW 137th Ave, Kendall, FL 33175 09/27/2023 $134,000.00
2024-CA-005629-0001-01 James Thompson 660 Brickell Ave Apt 1205, Miami, FL 33131 02/14/2024 $96,250.00
2024-CA-012087-0001-01 Angela Rivera 1875 NE 164th St, North Miami Beach, FL 33162 04/09/2024 $31,100.00
2023-CA-034891-0001-01 Carlos Mendez 3340 Bird Rd, South Miami, FL 33146 12/03/2023 $55,600.00

Showing 10 records. Last updated: January 2025. For records older than 2 years, contact the Civil Division directly.

Phone(305) 275-1155
HoursMonday – Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM

FormMC-3.900 (Motion to Disburse Surplus Funds)
